documentationFeedback: Envoy skill SKILL.md updated with Ghost Wispr section — clear topic format, parameters, and examples. AGENTS.md updated with ghostwispr receiver. No separate README or setup guide, appropriate for internal service.
observations: P2: Handler tests check wantPublished bool but don't verify envelope content (topic/source/dedupe key) — covered separately in normalization tests but no end-to-end integration
Event type normalization handles dots-to-underscores flexibly (e.g., session.ended header → session_ended)
Optional signing well-documented as deliberate design choice (Tailscale perimeter)
Pre-existing moduleResolution=node10 deprecation warning in infra tsconfig — unrelated to PR
